programs.title: How To Have A Better Orgasm
programs.desc: Women share how their experience of orgasms has improved thanks to better interpersonal communication, or just making time for themselves. Personal accounts reveal that, across the board, there's a turning point in learning how to have a better one.

programs.title: Student Sex Workers
programs.desc: Jasmine is a paramedic science student worried that she is about to get kicked off her course because of her work as an exotic dancer, and web-cammer; Carly Ray carried on with sex work after graduation and is now an award-winning porn star.

programs.title: Student Sex Workers
programs.desc: Ella has been bullied out of her university after her peers discovered she was an award-winning porn star, and Akonne is a sports science student and a stripper who doesn't consider himself to be a sex worker.

programs.title: Willie Nelson: The Outlaw Country King
True Dating Stories
programs.desc: Excited to go on a date with her crush, Carlita is surprised to end up at his mother's house instead; "RuPaul's Drag Race" contestant Vanessa Vanjie Mateo goes on a date in Texas and when her date starts ignoring her, all hell starts breaking loose.

programs.title: True Dating Stories
programs.desc: Alex goes on a karaoke date with Kevin, but is sad to learn that Kevin invited some friends.
